pr.title: Non-record: 11L XSA-all + Full GPTQ + Selective Pruning (val_bpb=1.1154, 3-seed)

output.summary: Extends the Parallel Muon stack by applying XSA across every layer and selective ±1 pruning after full GPTQ to tighten cross-layer mixing and compression.
techniques: XSA on all 11 layers for earlier cross-position mixing
Full Hessian GPTQ int6 with selective ±1 pruning to drop low-impact quantized entries
Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon pipeline with BigramHash and EMA/SWA stack
